title: Six standalone worktree-agent branches: lost test files and unmerged xtask subcommands
description:
All six standalone branches were inspected on 2026-04-29 and deleted because their bodies were superseded by commits already in main, while their additive content (test files, xtask subcommands) couldn't compile against main.

Reflog preserves these for ~90 days:

| Branch       | Reflog SHA | Lost additive content                                          |
|--------------|------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|
| a0dbf18...   | 5de77b9    | tests/api/test_storage_stack.c (578 lines)                    |
| a71da416...  | d1a81fb    | (none — fully superseded; cmd_gen_image.rs already in main)   |
| a8578e7c...  | 93ae8d9    | tests/harness/sel4_test_harness.c (254), test_harness_self.c (91), xtask/src/cmd_run_tests.rs (229) — alternate test harness |
| a8b8c56c...  | f685dd6    | xtask/src/cmd_gen_caps.rs (270 lines) — novel CNode allocation plan generator |
| ab1366df...  | 28ee68d    | tests/api/test_ep_alloc.c (398 lines)                         |
| ac19d4c7...  | 49ec085    | libs/libvmm/include/vmm_caps.h (159 lines) — note: main has libvmm/ (no libs/ prefix) so the path itself is wrong |

Of these, two items are worth re-investigating later:

1. **xtask gen-caps** (a8b8c56c): novel CNode allocation plan generator that doesn't exist in main. Per CLAUDE.md API-first mandate this would help validate cap budgets at build time.
2. **xtask run-tests + sel4_test_harness.c** (a8578e7c): main has tests/harness/{sel4_test_harness.h, test_framework.h, test_runner.c} but no xtask wrapper. The wrapper would let CI invoke the seL4-target tests uniformly.

The test files themselves (test_storage_stack, test_ep_alloc) reference branch-only APIs and would need rewriting against main's actual APIs.

title: Three duplicated tests/api/test_nameserver.c implementations were not salvaged
description:
Three deleted worktree-agent branches each added their own tests/api/test_nameserver.c targeting different opcodes:

- a639076b (deleted): 1165-line test file (full nameserver dispatch coverage)
- a9f9b727 (deleted): 657-line test file (OP_NS_REGISTER, OP_NS_LOOKUP)
- aa2d6ced (deleted): 891-line test file (OP_NS_REVOKE)

Plus a9f9b727 sketched an alternate userspace/servers/nameserver/ architecture (605-line src/nameserver.c, 102-line nameserver_internal.h, 30-line CMakeLists.txt) instead of the kernel/agentos-root-task placement that landed in main.

None of the test files compile against main's nameserver.h API. Reflog has commits 6a9c0d9, 244294a, 4175096 for ~90 days.

Main's nameserver coverage today: tests/contracts/nameserver_test.c. If gaps exist (REGISTER/LOOKUP/REVOKE edge cases), this is the work to mine for them.

title: Investigate richer ut_alloc/pd_vspace/cap_acct APIs lost from worktree-agent branches
description:
Four worktree-agent branches (a309f0a3, acf4d3c0, ade901a4, aea01ddb) implemented richer kernel APIs than what landed in main. Their test files reference symbols absent from main:

- ut_alloc.h: branches expose ut_alloc(), main only exposes ut_advance_slot_cursor()
- pd_vspace.h: branches expose pd_vspace_init(), pd_vspace_map_frame(), pd_vspace_set_scratch_va(); main only has pd_vspace_create() and pd_vspace_load_elf()
- cap_accounting.h: branches expose cap_acct_count_pd(), cap_acct_revoke_pd(); main only has cap_acct_init() and cap_acct_record()

The test suites (test_ut_alloc.c 493 lines, test_pd_vspace.c 851 lines, test_cap_accounting.c 584 lines) cannot compile against main and were therefore not merged when the branches were cleaned up on 2026-04-29. The branches were deleted but the work history is in reflog for ~90 days.

Deciding whether to extend main's APIs to match the branch versions, port the tests, and re-add cap_acct_revoke_pd() (used for VOS_DESTROY) is a real design call.

title: libmicrokit_compat shim was scoped but never integrated
description:
Branch worktree-agent-aaa95813 (deleted 2026-04-29) added libs/libmicrokit_compat (465 lines: CMakeLists.txt + microkit.h + microkit_compat.c) providing a Microkit→raw seL4 IPC compatibility shim:

  microkit_ppcall, microkit_notify, microkit_irq_ack, microkit_get_variable
  + microkit_compat_register_channel/irq/variable setup helpers

Main has zero callers using the shim — all current microkit references are in libvmm/dep/sddf/ (third-party tree) and tests/. Per CLAUDE.md (no features beyond what the task requires) the shim was not salvaged.

If a future migration wants to gradually port libvmm or test code off Microkit, this shim is in reflog (commit 92cfdda).
